final:
module RefModule(
  input in0,
  input in1,
  input in2,
  input in3,
  input sel0,
  input sel1,
  output out
wire __sel1_tmp = (sel1 == 0 && sel0 == 0);
assign out = __sel1_tmp ? in0 : (sel1 == 0 && sel0 == 1) ? in1 :
               (sel1 == 1 && sel0 == 0) ? in2 :
               (sel1 == 1 && sel0 == 1) ? in3 :
               1'bx;

endmodule
